name: Nikken Kogaku Co., Ltd.
summary: Nikken Kogaku Co., Ltd. develops wave dissipating blocks, coastal revetment blocks, and other civil engineering products in Japan. The company offers coastal protection blocks, riverbank disaster-prevention and environment protection blocks/natural stone products, and geo-synthetics. It serves primarily ministry of land, infrastructure, transport, and tourism; and local governments, construction companies, and construction consultants. The company was incorporated in 1950 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
